utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination is fully specified with city and country; (2) travel_dates are explicitly provided; (3) transportation includes flight details and costs; (4) accommodation includes hotel info and total cost; (5) activities are fully listed with names, types, durations, and costs; (6) additional_services are included with type, duration, and cost; (7) total_budget is fully provided with cost breakdown. Therefore, all 7 required items are covered and fully specified.
